name: noola-flow-runner
description: Ephemeral Node execution container for Studio browser/AI-browser flows (Studio→Studio fold). Runs one automation graph to completion, driving a local headless Chromium via Playwright + Stagehand/Claude, writing runner_runs.result_json/node_events and publishing run.<id> progress to NATS. The deterministic item nodes + shared helpers come from @repo/flow-core (esbuild inlines them into the bundle).

scripts.vendor:flow-core: if [ -f ../../api/packages/flow-core/src/index.ts ]; then mkdir -p flow-core && cp ../../api/packages/flow-core/src/index.ts flow-core/index.ts; fi
